subtitles.original: 取り外せるんで、これで自忍ぽこべえごっこができるようになります
subtitles.english: Since it's removable, you can play-act as Jinin Pokobe with this!

subtitles.original: 自忍ぽこべえごっこをしたい方
subtitles.english: For those of you who want to play as Jinin Pokobe,

subtitles.original: まあ、取り外してそのまま飾りたい方もね、どうぞ！
subtitles.english: or if you just want to remove it and display it, please go ahead!

subtitles.original: はい、そしてお次はこちら！
subtitles.english: Alright, and next up is this!

subtitles.original: ペットボトルホルダー！
subtitles.english: A PET bottle holder!

subtitles.original: あの、これは風真いろはさんが欲しいのを作りました！
subtitles.english: Um, I made this because it's something I really wanted!

subtitles.original: あの、イラストはさめあんこ先生に描いていただきました
subtitles.english: The illustration was drawn by Sameanko-sensei.

subtitles.original: 可愛いでしょ？この真ん中の穴に
subtitles.english: Isn't it cute? In this middle hole,

subtitles.original: あの、ギュッてペットボトルのところを入れてね
subtitles.english: you tightly insert the neck of the PET bottle,

subtitles.original: あの、使うやつです、はい
subtitles.english: and that's how you use it. Yes!

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃおしゃれです、よかったら使ってください
subtitles.english: It's very stylish, so please use it if you'd like.

subtitles.original: カバンとかね、付けて持ち運べるんでね
subtitles.english: You can attach it to your bag to carry it around!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: そしてラストはこちら！
subtitles.english: And finally, here's the last one!

subtitles.original: はい！実は地味になかった、セーラー服衣装の風真いろはのぬいぐるみ！
subtitles.english: Yes! A sailor uniform version of my plushie, which surprisingly didn't exist before!

subtitles.original: なんと、ボイス付きです！
subtitles.english: And it actually comes with voices!

subtitles.original: こちらもさめあんこ先生に原案考えていただきました
subtitles.english: Sameanko-sensei also designed the draft for this.

subtitles.original: レインポンチョを着た、声が出るぬいぐるみです
subtitles.english: It's a voice-playing plushie wearing a rain poncho.

subtitles.original: まあ、あの、お腹を握りしめると音が出るらしいぞ
subtitles.english: Apparently, it plays sound when you squeeze its tummy!

subtitles.original: 今のところはな、はい！
subtitles.english: At least, for now. Yes!

subtitles.original: 外出時にカバンなどに付けることもできます。で、ボイスなんですけど
subtitles.english: You can also attach it to your bag when you go out. And about the voices...

subtitles.original: なんか、天気に関するものを録ったんですよ
subtitles.english: I actually recorded things related to the weather!

subtitles.original: どんな感じかはまだね、さすがに言えないけど。だけど、あの
subtitles.english: I can't tell you exactly what it's like yet, of course. But...

subtitles.original: おみくじ感覚で聞いて
subtitles.english: you can listen to it like a fortune-telling slip,

subtitles.original: あの、その天気にならなかったからと言って、風真いろはを責めないでください
subtitles.english: so please don't blame me if the weather doesn't turn out that way!

subtitles.original: 自己責任で、にぎにぎしてください
subtitles.english: Please squeeze it at your own risk!

subtitles.original: 買ってからのお楽しみです！
subtitles.english: Look forward to it after you buy it!

subtitles.original: いっぱいありましたが、フルセットを見ていきましょう！
subtitles.english: We had a lot of items, but let's check out the full set!

subtitles.original: こちら！
subtitles.english: Here it is!

subtitles.original: 今回のグッズはですね、生誕のイメージに合わせてフェス風をテーマに作ってみました
subtitles.english: This time, we created the merchandise with a festival theme to match my birthday image.

subtitles.original: 実用性たっぷりだし、これからの季節にぴったりなんで
subtitles.english: It's very practical and perfect for the upcoming season,

subtitles.original: よかったら、よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: so I'd appreciate it if you checked it out!

subtitles.original: そしてフルセット購入特典は、こちら！
subtitles.english: And the purchase bonus for the full set is this!

subtitles.original: 数量限定版あります。風真いろはの
subtitles.english: There is a limited-quantity version. It includes

subtitles.original: 直筆サインと箔押し複製メッセージ入りチケット風カード、ちょっとおしゃれな感じですね
subtitles.english: a ticket-style card with my handwritten signature and a foil-stamped message. It has a classy feel to it!

subtitles.original: そして通常版には、箔押し複製サインとメッセージ入りチケット風カードがついてきます保存版
subtitles.english: And the standard version comes with a ticket-style card featuring a foil-stamped signature and message.

subtitles.original: えー、さらにどちらにも、えー、ボイスがついてきますね、はい
subtitles.english: Furthermore, both versions come with a voice recording. Yes!

subtitles.original: 「きみと雨宿り」というなんかタイトルのボイスがついてくるんですけど、まあ、ぶっちゃけあの
subtitles.english: It's a voice track titled "Sheltering from the Rain with You." Frankly, though...

subtitles.original: 気になったら聴いてください
subtitles.english: please listen to it if you're curious!

subtitles.original: ボイスは無理に聴かせたいからね
subtitles.english: I really want you to hear this voice track!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、シチュエーションボイスですね。雨宿り系だった気が
subtitles.english: Yes, so it's a situation voice. I think it was a sheltering-from-the-rain situation...

subtitles.original: なんか照れながら録った気がします！
subtitles.english: I feel like I recorded it while feeling embarrassed!

subtitles.original: そしてグッズは21時カートオープンです！
subtitles.english: And the merchandise cart opens at 21:00!

subtitles.original: すみません、あの、生配信につきちょっと時間が押しそうなんですけど
subtitles.english: I'm sorry, since this is a live broadcast, we're running a bit behind schedule...

subtitles.original: あの、ゆっくり買ってねとは言えず
subtitles.english: I can't tell you to take your time buying,

subtitles.original: 頑張ってください！どうしようもない、ごめん！
subtitles.english: so do your best! There's nothing I can do, sorry!

subtitles.original: そしてあの、21時からホロメンの多分配信控えてると思うんですけど、あの、何も気にしなくていいんでスタートしてくださいね、はい！
subtitles.english: And also, around 21:00, other Hololive members' streams are probably scheduled, but please don't worry about me and just start them, okay? Yes!

subtitles.original: はい！そして
subtitles.english: Yes! And...

subtitles.original: まだまだあります！
subtitles.english: there's still more!

subtitles.original: まだまだ！それがこちら！
subtitles.english: Still more! Here it is!

subtitles.original: はい、新曲！
subtitles.english: Yes, a new song!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: 風真いろはさんの新曲が出ます。タイトルは「風向きエントロピー」
subtitles.english: I'm releasing a new song! The title is "Kazamuki Entropy."

subtitles.original: 作詞作曲は「いろはステップ」でもおなじみ、40mPさんにしていただきました！
subtitles.english: The lyrics and music were written by 40mP-san, who is also known for "Iroha Step"!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: 配信後にこちらMVが、えーと、公開されます
subtitles.english: After the stream, the MV will be released!

subtitles.original: 多分、こっそり今マネちゃんがプレミア公開に切り替えてくれているはず
subtitles.english: My manager is probably stealthily switching it to a premiere release right now!

subtitles.original: 楽曲は0時リリースになっております！
subtitles.english: The song will be released digitally at midnight!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: そしてあの、ちょっと気付いた人もいるかもしれないんですけど
subtitles.english: And some of you might have already noticed,

subtitles.original: ジャケットの文字は風真いろはさんが自分で書きました、はい。ありがとうございます
subtitles.english: but the text on the jacket art was hand-written by me! Yes, thank you very much.

subtitles.original: ということで
subtitles.english: So with that said,

subtitles.original: もう終わっちゃうんですけど
subtitles.english: we're already nearing the end,

subtitles.original: なんか、すごいトレンド2位とかに入ってるっていう連絡を受けました！うそ！
subtitles.english: but I just received word that we're trending at number 2! No way!

subtitles.original: あと残り頑張ってくれと言いたいけど
subtitles.english: I want to tell you to keep pushing for the top, but...

subtitles.original: でもみんな本当にいっぱいポストしてくれてありがとうね！
subtitles.english: anyway, thank you all so much for posting so much!

subtitles.original: よし、準備できた？
subtitles.english: Alright, are you ready?

subtitles.original: 音の準備は全部できてそうなので
subtitles.english: It looks like all the audio setup is complete,

subtitles.original: 早速、新曲歌っていきたいと思います！
subtitles.english: so I'm going to perform my new song right away!

subtitles.original: しかし、しかし！
subtitles.english: However, however!

subtitles.original: 今回はちょっと特別なものを用意してきました！
subtitles.english: I've prepared something a bit special for this!

subtitles.original: ゴンドラ、来い！
subtitles.english: Gondola, come on out!

subtitles.original: おお！
subtitles.english: Oh!

subtitles.original: リハーサルで見たけど、やっぱいいなこれ！
subtitles.english: I saw it during rehearsal, but this is really great!

subtitles.original: ほっ、というわけで
subtitles.english: Up we go! So with that,

subtitles.original: みんな、ぽこべえがいなくて寂しかったでしょ？
subtitles.english: you guys were lonely without Pokobe, right?

subtitles.original: 今年は、ゴンドラになりました！
subtitles.english: This year, he became a gondola!

subtitles.original: はい、というわけで、早速やっていくんですが
subtitles.english: Yes, so we'll get started right away, but...

subtitles.original: ドア、オープン！
subtitles.english: Door, open!

subtitles.original: イェーイ、ほっ！乗っちゃおうね！
subtitles.english: Yay, up! Let's get on!

subtitles.original: というわけで！
subtitles.english: So with that...

subtitles.original: 早速、歌っていきたいと思います
subtitles.english: I'd like to perform the song right away.

subtitles.original: それでは聴いてください。風真いろは、新オリジナル曲
subtitles.english: Please listen to my new original song,

subtitles.original: 「風向きエントロピー」
subtitles.english: "Kazamuki Entropy."

subtitles.original: 風向きエントロピー\n作詞・作曲・編曲：40mP
subtitles.english: Kazamuki Entropy\nLyrics, Composition, Arrangement: 40mP

subtitles.original: ねえ いつからそこにあったの？
subtitles.english: Hey, when did you get there?

subtitles.original: あまりにも近すぎて気づかなかったよ
subtitles.english: It was so close, I didn't even notice.

subtitles.original: ずっと私が生まれた日から
subtitles.english: You've been by my side

subtitles.original: そばにいてくれたのにね
subtitles.english: since the day I was born, haven't you?

subtitles.original: 曖昧で
subtitles.english: Ambiguous...

subtitles.original: 複雑で
subtitles.english: ...complex...

subtitles.original: 予測不可能で
subtitles.english: ...and unpredictable,

subtitles.original: 気まぐれに変わってゆく空の模様
subtitles.english: the ever-changing appearance of the sky.

responses.thoughts:
**A Deep Dive into Subtitles and Stream Analysis**

Alright, let's break this down. First, the task: create accurate, time-synced subtitles for this video. Sounds simple, right? But with my level of expertise, we're not just throwing words on the screen; we're crafting a faithful representation of the spoken and intended meaning, complete with nuances and cultural context.

So, here's what I've been doing:

Initially, there was a bit of a hiccup, trying to clarify what "ジニンポコベ" actually meant. It was a matter of parsing the Japanese and understanding the playful terms. Ah, yes! "自称忍 ぽこべえ" or "Ji-nin Pokobe" - referring to her tanuki mascot. It's about getting the translation *right*, ensuring that the intended humor and character are conveyed.

Then, there was careful listening, transcription, and translation, block by block, adjusting for phrasing, idioms, and natural speech patterns. We had to clarify that in the first line, the phrase was actually "...取り外せるんで" (since it's removable).

I had to ensure that the character's intent and tone was captured correctly and that the translations are precise and contextually accurate.

The next few items were straightforward: a PET bottle holder, the details about it being her personal request, and the inclusion of Sameanko-sensei's illustrations. Capturing the character's enthusiasm when she was talking about making the items was the goal, and so I ensured that it was captured in the translation.

Now, that sailor uniform plushie, that was more nuanced. It wasn't just a matter of transcription. It was about capturing the character's surprise at its non-existence. The key thing: the rain poncho, the voice clips - they needed to be accurately described, and the call-to-action to use the plushie as a fortune-telling slip was something to be highlighted as well.

The Full Set merchandise and the purchase bonus were captured in the following blocks: the limited version, the ticket-style cards, with signature and messages, both versions having voice recordings (and the need to emphasize the "Sheltering from the Rain with You" voice track). I've got to make sure people will want to hear the content.

We also had some fun moments where the character, seemed shy, as if recording the situation voice (the "terenagara" or "照れながら" part) - that was tricky to capture, the translation, the cultural understanding!

The last part of the summary had to capture the sense of urgency ("21:00 cart open, so do your best").

There was also a quick check on trends, which brought a "No way!" response. Gotta capture that feeling.

Finally, the new song, "Kazamuki Entropy," with 40mP's involvement. It was followed by a song, and I made sure to capture the timing, lyrics, and lyrics with the song.
